data.content: Shipment review approved. Commit 7532cc98f6ae is on main with all CI workflows green (CI, Release, Repo Hygiene, Changesets Version PR). Verified: (1) Review Basis section scopes approval to code + knot description + acceptance criteria, (2) notes and handoff_capsules explicitly excluded from approval decisions, (3) all three rejection paths require enumerated violations of knot description and/or acceptance criteria in handoff capsule. Tests in src/skills.rs verify all properties.
